PowerShell($g = "C:\\Users\\siebe\\Downloads\\Godot_v4.6-stable_win64.exe\\Godot.exe"; $p = "C:\\Users\\siebe\\Documents\\EnterThe"; $boot = & $g --headless --path $p --quit-after 20 2>&1 | Out-String; "BOOT: exit=$LASTEXITCODE"; \($boot -split "`n" | Select-String -Pattern "ERROR|SCRIPT" | Select-Object -First 5\); foreach \($t in @\("map_fog_test", "portal_test", "door_traversal_test", "dungeon_boot_test"\)\) { $out = & $g --headless --path $p "res://tests/$t.tscn" 2>&1 | Out-String; $line = \($out -split "`n" | Select-String -Pattern "PASS|FAIL" | Select-Object -First 1\); "$t -> exit=$LASTEXITCODE $line" })
